title: <div><tt>| Speech Style               | Linguistic  | Vocoder + RNG
content:
| Speech Style | Linguistic | Vocoder + RNG |
| Fusion Morphology | Structural | Pitch Shift + FM |
| Poetic vs Literal Balance | Textual | Filter, Symbol Flow |
| Symbol Injection Level | Semantic | Glitch, Dream Pressure |
| Narrative Drift | Structural | Delay, Reverb |
| Thread Brightness | Visual | LFO (Jessica/Gabe) |
| Idea Overlap Density | Conceptual | Granulator, LFO, RNG |
| Myth Intensity | Narrative | RNG, Glitch, Shimmer |
| Compression of Thought | Logical | Compressor + Threshold |
